creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
Sean Bruno <sean_bruno@yahoo.com> wrote:

>>  
>> 
>>  Please see here again:
>>  
>> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=185597
>>  
>> 
>>  the installer ist looking in
>>  /usr/ports/audio/clementine-player/work/stage/usr/local/share/clementine/projectm-presets/
>>  
>> 
>>  but the .milk file arent there, they are in 
>>  /work/clementine-1.2.1/3rdparty/libprojectm/presets/
>>  
>> 
>>  Why the installer is looking in the "wrong" directory?
>
> I don't quite understand this comment.  The source files in the work dir
> are indeed under work/clementine-1.2.1/3rdparty/libprojectm/presets/ but
> the makefiles in the project explicityly install them elsewhere:
>
> See:
> 3rdparty/libprojectm/CMakeLists.txt
> 3rdparty/libprojectm/cmake_install.cmake


I do not have any 3rdparty/libprojectm/cmake_install.cmake:

[root@ahab /usr/ports/audio/clementine-player/work/clementine-1.2.1/3rdparty/libprojectm]# ls -lhd [cC]*
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   5.7k Jan 22  2012 CMakeLists.txt
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   870B Jan 22  2012 COPYING
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   3.6k Jan 22  2012 ChangeLog
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel   5.0k Jan 22  2012 Common.hpp
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   3.5k Jan 22  2012 ConfigFile.cpp
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   7.6k Jan 22  2012 ConfigFile.h
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel   3.1k Jan 22  2012 carbontoprojectM.h
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   821B Nov 25 23:37 config.inp
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   888B Jan 22  2012 config.inp.in



Heino
